proposal_summary: Proposes the DeFi Renaissance Incentive Program (DRIP), a new incentives framework utilizing 3-month targeted seasons to incentivize specific assets and activities on Arbitrum. Requests an 80M ARB allocation to be managed by a Season Selection Committee (Arbitrum Foundation, Entropy Advisors, Offchain Labs) via a Foundation-controlled wallet with DAO clawback capabilities.

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum Foundation
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: All funds will be sent to an Arbitrum Foundation controlled wallet with DAO-clawback capabilities.

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum DAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The DAO will have the ability to kill the DRIP program via a snapshot vote with 3% quorum

claimed_actions.raw_action: Transfer 80M ARB to a foundation-controlled wallet
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Funds the DRIP program for up to 4 seasons, with unallocated funds held or returned to the DAO.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The DRIP seeks funding of 80M ARB for the first 4 seasons... All funds will be sent to an Arbitrum Foundation controlled wallet with DAO-clawback capabilities.

claimed_complexity.reason: The author explicitly states the program's design and intent is simple, targeted, and measurable.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The DRIP is purposefully simple, targeted, and measurable

limitations: The specific address for the Foundation-controlled wallet is not disclosed.
The technical implementation of the 'DAO-clawback capabilities' is not described in detail.
